scripts.build: npm run build:runtime && npm run build:web
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test packages/shared/dist/plaud.test.js packages/shared/dist/formatting.test.js apps/api/dist/plaud/client.test.js apps/api/dist/phase1/spike.test.js apps/api/dist/cli/spike.test.js apps/api/dist/runtime/secrets.test.js apps/api/dist/runtime/store.test.js apps/api/dist/runtime/scheduler.test.js apps/api/dist/runtime/environment.test.js apps/api/dist/runtime/service.test.js apps/api/dist/server.test.js tests/integration/http.test.mjs tests/integration/web-build.test.mjs && npm run test:web
